ground_truth.title: Personal Training
ground_truth.main_content: The Benson Alex Rise Fitness and Recreation Center offers one-on-one training sessions with one of our several nationally certified personal trainers who can help you improve your current routine or design something completely new.
with: The Benson Alex Rise Fitness and Recreation Center offers one-on-one training sessions with one of our several nationally certified personal trainers.
Personal trainers can help you improve your current routine or design something completely new.
Sessions are available at the Benson Alex Rise Fitness and Recreation Center.
Trainers are nationally certified fitness professionals.
The center provides personalized fitness guidance through one-on-one training.
